## Phase 10 completada â€” OOXML primary + COM fallback

### Nuevo archivo: `src/ooxml_engine.py`
`OOXMLEngine` â€” wrapper openpyxl puro, ~440 lÃ­neas, 4 fases:

| Fase | MÃ©todos | Tipo |
|------|---------|------|
| 1 | `read_cell/range/sheet_data`, `list_sheets`, `get_workbook_info`, `get_hidden_rows/cols`, `get_merged_cells`, `get_used_range` | Reads (cero riesgo) |
| 2 | `write_cell/range`, `clear_range`, `merge/unmerge_cells`, `find_replace`, `find_in_workbook`, `get_formula`, `list_formulas`, `list/create/delete_named_ranges` | Writes + Formula reads |
| 3 | `detect_volatile_formulas`, `detect_magic_numbers`, `export_to_csv` | Audit + Export |
| 4 | `bulk_font_change`, `apply_number_format`, `add/list_hyperlinks` | Formatting |
